Bash(# 2. 世界观
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/worldbuilding/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/世界观/"
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/worldbuilding/extended/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/世界观/扩展档案/"
echo "世界观 done"

# 3. 剧情
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/plots/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/剧情/"
echo "剧情 done"

# 4. 提示词
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/prompts/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/提示词/"
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/prompts/presets/* "D:/Desktop/AIbot/提示词/预设/"
echo "提示词 done"

# 5. 索引
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/index/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/索引/"
echo "索引 done"

# 6. 小说 - 先把旧小说移到归档
mkdir -p "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧小说"
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/小说/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧小说/"
# 然后用新的novel/覆盖小说/
rm D:/Desktop/AIbot/小说/*.md
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/novel/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/小说/"
echo "小说 done"

# 7. 归档 - 把旧源材料归档
mkdir -p "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧知识库" "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧剧情剧本" "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧人设"
cp -r D:/Desktop/AIbot/archive/lorabak/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧知识库/" 2>/dev/null
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/archive/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/" 2>/dev/null
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/剧情剧本/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧剧情剧本/"
cp D:/Desktop/AIbot/人设/*.md "D:/Desktop/AIbot/归档/旧人设/"
echo "归档 done")
